task: TSRV-P5-3 v2.0_RC criterion 3 — Zeta AI Likert comparison harness

context.criterion: ALM/CLM Likert mean > Zeta AI (Scatter Lab Zeta chat service)
context.zeta_policy: No live API calls — ethics/free-tier. Zeta responses collected offline into CSV, loaded blind.

stage_2_blind_ui.blinding: per-pair coin flip (LCG seeded by wall clock) decides if column A = anima

stage_3_stats.algorithm: Mann-Whitney U with tie correction + continuity correction + normal approx p-value

mock_built_in_stats.description: 30 anima scores (~mean 4.23) vs 30 zeta (~mean 3.40), baked into zeta_ab_stats.hexa

full_pipeline_e2e.description: runner mock → blind_ui simulate 30 → stats analyze

hexa_quirks_handled: && / || are eager (no short-circuit) — split guards into nested if
arrays are pass-by-value — index assignment arr[i]=v works on mutable locals only
no .set() method on arrays — use direct index assignment
no dual-return — pack parallel arrays into single flat array with sentinel
read_file returns Error type for missing paths — probe via split
next_steps_for_real_eval: Collect real Zeta AI responses offline to zeta_responses.csv (id,response)
Collect ≥30 human Likert ratings (each rating covers one pair → 2 scores, so ≥30 pair ratings total)
Gate passes iff ALM verdict=PASS (criterion 3 for v2.0_RC)

guardrails.l0_freeze: all new files are anima-agent-scope; no anima-core touching
guardrails.hexa_only: no .py/.rs/.sh new files; no Python fallback
guardrails.no_zeta_api: live Zeta calls prohibited — CSV ingestion only
guardrails.worktree_isolation: built in agent-a7b1271a worktree, clean merge path

gate_status: HARNESS_READY — real user evaluation blocked on Zeta response collection + human raters
